entities.context: Refers to a specific location for AI-generated responses

entities.name: N5

relationships.context: V uses ai_responses for storing completion responses
ai_responses are located within the N5 workspace
MEETING_ID is tied to a specific TIMESTAMP indicating when the response is completed
